zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzWalter於1158年出生在英國素福爾可可洛普頓時，她的父親Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow34歲，母親Mathilda de Lucy22歲。她和Gilbert de Pêche至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1213年在英國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzWalter于1158年出生在英国素福爾可可洛普頓时，她的父亲Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow34岁，母亲Mathilda de Lucy22岁。她和Gilbert de Pêche至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1213年在英国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzWalter was born in 1158, in Clopton, Suffolk, England, her father, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, was 34 and her mother, Mathilda de Lucy, was 22. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Gilbert de Pêche. She died in 1213, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzWalter est née en 1158, à Clopton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Lucy, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Gilbert de Pêche. Elle est décédée en 1213, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzWalter 1158 in Clopton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow 34 und ihre Mutter Mathilda de Lucy 22. Sie hatte mit Gilbert de Pêche mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1213 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzWalter è nata il nel 1158 nel Clopton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Mathilda de Lucy, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Gilbert de Pêche. Morì nel 1213, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWalterが1158年にイギリススフォルククロプトンで生まれた時，父Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmowは34歳，母Mathilda de Lucyは22歳であった。彼女はGilbert de Pêcheとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1213年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWalter(이)가 1158년 영국 수폴크 클로프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda de Lucy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Gilbert de Pêche(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1213년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzWalter nasceu em 1158, em Clopton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda de Lucy, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Gilbert de Pêche. Ela faleceu em 1213, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzWalter родилась в 1158 г. в местности клоптон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Lucy, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Gilbert de Pêche. Она умерла в 1213 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzWalter nació en 1158, en Clopton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mathilda de Lucy, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Gilbert de Pêche. Murió en 1213, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
